title: Vietnamese-Style Tofu Bun Cha
description: A popular Vietnamese street food dish featuring marinated tofu and pork grilled over charcoal, served with fresh herbs and crispy rice noodles. This recipe is a vegetarian twist on the classic version.
instructions: Marinate the tofu in savory sauce for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Grill the tofu for 3-4 minutes per side, until golden brown.
Meanwhile, cook the rice noodles according to package instructions.
Combine the bun cha sauce, green onions, mint leaves, cilantro leaves, sesame seeds, and sugar in a bowl.
To assemble the dish, place a portion of noodles on a plate, followed by sliced grilled tofu, and drizzle with the bun cha sauce.
